records.pageName: Great British Brands Product of the Year 2026
records.summary: Banham showcases a prestigious 2026 product award, a century of family business heritage, and named co-managing directors — all strong trust signals. The page emphasises craftsmanship, British manufacturing, and a robust product range with specialist team support in showrooms.
records.topOpportunity: Adding embedded Google/Trustpilot reviews and a trade body membership badge section could round out an already strong trust page
records.notes: Banham is a well-established, highly credible brand with strong heritage and award proof points — very cold lead with minimal web agency opportunity.

records.summary: This page details Banham's patented lock and key systems, including the Mark III patent valid until 2032, emphasising legal exclusivity, key registration, and a decades-long history of innovation. It functions as a strong technical trust signal demonstrating proprietary security credentials.
records.topOpportunity: Integrating customer testimonials or case studies to complement the technical patent content with social proof
records.notes: Banham's patent page is a sophisticated trust asset that few competitors can match — this is a cold lead representing a mature, self-sufficient brand.
